description: Labor hour limit — brake pad replacement
message: Labor hours for brake pad replacement (B2799) must not exceed 2.0 hrs.
exampleViolation: Claim submits 6.5 labor hours for a brake pad swap — policy cap is 2.0 hrs.

description: Labor hour limit — wheel speed sensor
message: Labor hours for wheel speed sensor replacement (C1201) must not exceed 1.5 hrs.
exampleViolation: Claim submits 4.0 labor hours for a single sensor replacement.

message: Labor hours for catalytic converter replacement (P0420) must not exceed 2.5 hrs.
exampleViolation: Claim submits 5.5 labor hours for catalytic converter work.

description: Labor hour limit — power window regulator
message: Labor hours for power window regulator (B2780) must not exceed 1.0 hr.
exampleViolation: Claim submits 3.5 labor hours for a window regulator replacement.

message: Labor hours for brake booster replacement (C1241) must not exceed 2.5 hrs.
exampleViolation: Claim submits 5.0 labor hours for brake booster work.

message: Basic warranty claims are only eligible for vehicles under 36,000 miles.
exampleViolation: Claim submitted for a vehicle at 58,000 miles under basic warranty.

message: Powertrain warranty claims are only eligible for vehicles under 60,000 miles.
exampleViolation: Claim submitted for a vehicle at 68,000 miles under powertrain warranty.

description: Repair code coverage — basic warranty exclusions
message: Repair codes U0100, P0420, P0301, P0172 are not covered under basic warranty — powertrain or extended required.
exampleViolation: ECM replacement (U0100) submitted under basic warranty.

description: Repair code coverage — powertrain warranty exclusions
message: Repair codes B1420, B2780, B2799, C1201, C1241, C1336 are not covered under powertrain warranty — basic or extended required.
exampleViolation: HVAC blower motor (B1420) submitted under powertrain warranty.

description: Diagnostic evidence required before major component replacement
condition: techNotes must not contain phrases indicating unverified diagnosis before ECM replacement
message: ECM or major powertrain component replacement requires documented, verified root cause in technician notes.
exampleViolation: Tech notes state 'unable to fully verify root cause prior to replacement' — ECM replaced without confirmed diagnosis.
